title: senecio volckmannii var. pinohachense
intro: Senecio volckmannii var. pinohachense, also known as the Pinohachense Woolly Groundsel, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Senecio volckmannii var. pinohachense include reducing pain, inflammation, and improving respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, but its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential toxicity.
